case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCAITES, LLC VS. TADEUSZ K. TALAREK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION ON NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCAITES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-02-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
